nasb.text: Draw for yourself water for the siege! Strengthen your fortifications! Go into the clay and tread the mortar! Take hold of the brick mold!

esv.text: Draw water for the siege; strengthen your forts; go into the clay; tread the mortar; take hold of the brick mold!

cnv.text: 你要打水，以備圍困， 鞏固你的堡壘， 踹泥踏土， 緊握磚模。

ccb.text: 你要蓄水以防围困， 要加强防御！ 要走进土坑踩泥， 拿起砖模造砖！
